hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); AGENT_TYPE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // empty'); case "$AGENT_TYPE" in validate-diff|verify-and-fix|analyze-architecture|review-conversation) mkdir -p .reviewer/outputs/active_agents && echo "$AGENT_TYPE" > ".reviewer/outputs/active_agents/$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_id')" ;; esac; exit 0
INPUT=$(cat); AGENT_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_id // empty'); rm -f ".reviewer/outputs/active_agents/$AGENT_ID" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
